title: Harbor Container Port -- Berth-Code Prediction (Dyck length-generalization)
strategies: trivial: predict the single most-frequent training berth code for every UNLOAD (~0.1)
greedy: track the LIFO stack and learn a code map keyed on the removed container's bay-type only
strong: track the stack and learn the full hidden (top,under) local law with stupid-backoff, generalizing to the longer/deeper OOD manifests
invalid: emit a wrong-shape / out-of-range answer -> 0
